rows.endpoint: pro-fibrotic pathway/protein increase in failing hearts
rows.source_excerpt: EPRS was induced at mRNA and protein levels (~1.5–2.5 fold increase) in failing hearts

rows.endpoint: fibrosis burden around ~10% condition (paper APD-dispersion example reports 10% fibrosis context)
rows.source_excerpt: APD dispersion increased to 70 ms from 24 ms with 10% fibrosis

definition: Strict hard-anchored mode: only manually approved paper-reported quantitative endpoints are scored.
